stemHtml: Flying to the same destination on two different days, ATC requests a speed of 220 kt in the descent. On day 1, the aircraft is light and has a VMD of 203 kt. On day 2, the aircraft is heavier and has a VMD of 218 kt. At 220 kt, which aircraft has a longer glide range?

options.a: The lighter aircraft will have more range because it is further above VMD.
options.b: The lighter aircraft will have more range because it needs less lift.
options.c: The heavier aircraft will have a higher AoA and higher lift which reduces the rate of descent.
options.d: The heavier aircraft, as the aircraft descends closer to the speed for best lift/drag ratio, and it will be more difficult to control the speed in the descent.
